newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The Kaohsiung semiconductor megasite inauguration, Shizuoka AMDC investment and the May 1 Electronics CEO appointment all predate the window; no new Electronics/semiconductor-materials datapoint or guidance change has landed since June 9. Stock is -2.3% over the window, drift.

verdicts.rankRationale: Under-owned-bottleneck master list: upstream fab-materials (thin films, formulation, specialty gases) exposure is a genuine pick-and-shovel bottleneck. Prior up-move already priced the Q1 semis-materials strength and Kaohsiung ramp; nothing new since June 9, so the rank stands. Listed 'negative YTD reset' thesis text is stale (+11% YTD).
verdicts.bull: Kaohsiung megasite and AI-driven Thin Films demand drive leading-edge materials exposure; diversified pharma/life-science ballast.
verdicts.neutral: Scarce upstream bottleneck but diluted within a large diversified conglomerate.
verdicts.bear: Electronics is a minority of a pharma-heavy mix; +11% YTD lags semis peers, materials pricing watch.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI-driven Thin Films/specialty-materials demand and Kaohsiung ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Conglomerate dilution; semiconductor-materials pricing and capex cyclicality
